title: Pukima's Vanilla+ Pack [ARCHIVED]
description: Enhance your Minecraft experience with Pukima's Vanilla+ Pack, featuring mods like Distant Horizons and Complementary Unbound Shader for stunning visuals and improved world generation, perfect for all players!
body:
Dive into an enhanced vanilla Minecraft experience with Pukima's Vanilla+ Pack! This modpack is designed for players who **appreciate the classic feel of Minecraft** while seeking to elevate their gameplay with carefully selected mods.

Featuring essential mods like Distant Horizons for expansive views, Complementary Unbound Shader for stunning visuals, Sound Physics for immersive audio, and Tectonic to enrich world generation with realistic algorithms, this pack transforms your Minecraft world into a breathtaking adventure.

Perfect for both multiplayer and singleplayer experiences, Pukima's Vanilla+ Pack is ideal for anyone looking to enjoy a refined yet familiar Minecraft journey. Please note that a beefier PC is recommended to fully enjoy the enhanced graphics and features.

Compatible with the latest (possible, due to mods) Minecraft version, this modpack is your gateway to a beautifully enhanced Minecraft experience. Join the adventure today!

> **Note!**
> There's one thing I actively use that isn't in this modpack is the [AVPBR Pack](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/avpbr-retextured), but I highly recommend it and since the previous link is just a demo, you can buy the full version on [their Patreon].(https://www.patreon.com/joaquix1021)
